name: qa-gentic-stlc-agents
summary: Five MCP servers covering the full QA Software Test Life Cycle — test cases, Gherkin BDD, self-healing Playwright code, Helix-QA file writing, and Jira Cloud integration. Both ADO and Jira pipelines run the full flow: fetch → test cases → Gherkin → Playwright → Helix-QA. MSAL OAuth for Azure DevOps, OAuth 2.0 (3LO) for Jira Cloud.
